main.description: A character, companion, or squad member in the player's party, for use in a play record's `state` array. For other human players, use the play record's `participants` field instead. Cardinality: instanced — unique per ($type, id, instanceId); writers append in join order and dedupe by `instanceId` when present.

id.description: Stable, game-defined identifier for this party member (eg. a character or companion id). Language-independent and consistent across play-throughs & game versions.

name.description: Human-readable display name in the locale active at write time (eg. a nickname the player gave this member). Optional, but recommended so renderers without a localised mapping of `id` can fall back to displaying this.

role.description: The member's class or role in the party (eg. `healer`, `warrior`).

level.description: The member's current level, for games with levelling.

equipment.description: Identifiers of items currently equipped by this member, matching the `id` or `instanceId` of `games.gamesgamesgamesgames.experimental.state.acquisition` entries in the same state array.

joinedAt.description: Wall-clock time this member joined the party.

leftAt.description: Wall-clock time this member left the party (dismissed, died permanently). Unset while still in the party.

instanceId.description: An optional unique identifier, eg. a uuid, for this specific instance of a party member. Will prevent accidental duplicates due to game crashes, and allows the same character to appear more than once.

items.description: Game-specific lexicons that can hold additional information about this party member.
